author: vvo
subject: chore(shrinkwrap): use uber/shrinkwrap
body:
PROS:
- consistent shrinkwrap, removes "from" weird things
- we should now be able to have a lot less noise when updating/adding
modules

CONS:
- need to be installed globally (weird stuff happens otherwise)
- not compatible with npm@3

This is currently my best solution to the shrinkwrap madness.

I updated the contributing guide, a lot easier now and faster to add,
update, remove packages.

I hope npm@3 gets better at shrinkwrap some day.

Also removed a bunch of useless packages we no more used
